# UNICV

> Build a professional resume in minutes with beautifully designed CV templates.

UNICV is a web-based CV maker that lets anyone browse curated templates, customize them in the browser, and download a polished resume as a PDF.

## Pages

- [Templates](/): Browse the full library of CV templates.
- [Create CV](/create-event): Start a new CV from scratch.
- [My CVs](/my-events): Manage saved CVs (requires sign-in).
- [Sign In](/auth): Log in or create an account.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
